holdings.infoBox: EEMO is an equity ETF with a total of 280 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 14.78%, Samsung Electronics at 10.88%, Samsung Electronics Co Ltd Participating Preferred at 4.75%, SK Square at 4.67%, and Delta Electronics at 4.48%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P Emerging Markets Momentum ETF (EEMO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap emerging market equities, selected by price momentum. Stocks are weighted by momentum, scaled by market-cap. EEMO was launched on Feb 24, 2012 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: S&P Momentum Emerging Plus LargeMidCap Index
